user.title: Dontek Aquatek Setup
user.description: Enter the MAC address from the QR code sticker on your Aquatek controller.

data_description.device_id: Scan the QR code sticker on your controller, or enter the number printed below it (e.g. 12345678901234567)

provision.title: Provisioning
provision.description: Registering your device with AWS IoT, please wait...

error.invalid_device_id: Invalid device ID. Enter the numeric ID printed below the QR code sticker on your controller.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to AWS IoT. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.provision_failed: Certificate provisioning failed. Please try again.

init.title: Dontek Aquatek
init.description:
**Device MAC:** `{mac}`

To reload the integration, close this dialog and use the ⋮ menu → Reload.
